name: Blueberry Buckle
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, mix sugar, shortening, and egg thoroughly.
2. Stir in milk.
3. Blend in dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, salt).
4. Fold in blueberries.
5. Allow batter to stand for 15 minutes.
6. Line a 9 x 9-inch glass baking dish with a paper towel. Pour batter into the baking dish.
7. In a small bowl, combine remaining ingredients (remaining sugar, flour, cinnamon, butter) until well blended. Sprinkle topping mixture over the batter.
8. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 12 minutes or until toothpick inserted in center comes out clean.
